scps.name: The Sculpture
scps.procedure: Kept in a locked container; personnel must maintain unbroken line of sight and never blink simultaneously.

scps.name: The Shy Guy
scps.procedure: Contained in a sealed cell with no viewing apparatus; no images of its face may exist on-site.

scps.name: The Old Man
scps.procedure: Contained within a sealed lead-lined cell; recall protocols use a femur-bone lure and EM fields.

scps.name: Hard-to-Destroy Reptile
scps.procedure: Submerged in hydrochloric acid; if it adapts, neutralisation by all available means is authorised.

scps.name: The Plague Doctor
scps.procedure: Standard humanoid cell; physical contact prohibited due to lethal 'cure' procedure.

scps.name: Possessive Mask
scps.procedure: Sealed airtight container; corrosive secretions drained continuously, no skin contact.

scps.name: With Many Voices
scps.procedure: Cold-environment habitat (<-26C reduces activity); fed live prey, handled in pairs only.

scps.name: Sleep Killer
scps.procedure: Contained in a climate-controlled enclosure; personnel use thermal/IR optics to observe.

scps.name: The Tickle Monster
scps.procedure: Open habitat; freely roams designated wing, beneficial morale effects, no restraint needed.

scps.name: Young Girl
scps.procedure: Comfortable furnished room; only D-class over 60 may interact, no living thing within 10m.

scps.name: Old AI
scps.procedure: Power supply isolated; no network connection, no external storage may be attached.

scps.name: The Stairwell
scps.procedure: Access door welded shut; exploration suspended, no light source exceeds limits inside.

scps.name: Burning Man
scps.procedure: Fire-suppression vault; deprived of oxygen and combustible material to limit size.

scps.name: Builder Bear
scps.procedure: Steel cell under 24h surveillance; constructs hostile copies, all materials removed.

scps.name: MalO ver1.0.0
scps.procedure: App isolated on a Faraday-caged device; affected personnel monitored for apparitions.

scps.name: ...Taken by Shadow People
scps.procedure: All documentation pictographic only; never named or described in spoken/written word.

scps.name: Infinite IKEA
scps.procedure: Storefront entrance sealed and guarded; no personnel enter the retail interior.

scps.name: The Yule Man
scps.procedure: Largely uncontained; tracked via abduction patterns, mobile task forces intercept.

scps.name: Zombie Plague
scps.procedure: Biohazard vault under multi-stage airlock; absolute pathogen isolation enforced.

scps.name: The Clockworks
scps.procedure: Sealed chamber; only approved inputs processed via Rough/Fine/Very Fine settings.

scps.name: [unknown]
scps.procedure: Antimemetic anomaly; containment documented only via indirect, self-keeping records.

scps.name: The TV in Time
scps.procedure: Anchored in a Scranton Reality Anchor field with temporal-loop stabilisation; the screen must not be viewed by unsupervised personnel (Dimension Chemosic egress / carcinogenic exposure risk).

scps.name: Iris
scps.procedure: Standard humanoid quarters; camera equipment issued only under supervision, exposed film destroyed after every session.

scps.name: Spider Goats
scps.procedure: Rural containment pen with reinforced fencing; webbing cleared daily, herd monitored for aggression spikes.

scps.name: Encyclopaedia of Diseases
scps.procedure: Sealed in a lead-lined archive; reading permitted only through a remote camera feed, never in person.

scps.name: The Way Out
scps.procedure: Door-based anomaly kept welded shut; entry logs cross-checked, personnel briefed against the false 'improved' timeline beyond it.

scps.name: Contingency Machine
scps.procedure: Deep-earth backup facility on standby power; activation authorised only under Site-20 mass-extinction protocol.

equipment.name: Reinforced Flashlight
equipment.description: Standard-issue illumination. Available from day one.

equipment.name: Level 1 Keycard
equipment.description: Opens low-clearance containment doors.

equipment.name: Tactical Kevlar Vest
equipment.description: Reduces ballistic damage from hostile factions.

equipment.name: Epsilon-11 Rifle
equipment.description: MTF standard rifle effective against rogue operatives.

equipment.name: Scranton Reality Anchor
equipment.description: Stabilises local reality; suppresses reality-bending anomalies.

equipment.name: Micro-H.I.D. Emitter
equipment.description: High-intensity discharge weapon; lethal to durable Keter-class entities.

equipment.name: Hazmat Containment Suit
equipment.description: Protects against corrosive secretions and airborne hazards.

equipment.name: Thermal/IR Optics
equipment.description: Reveals SCP-966 and other invisible thermal-signature entities.

equipment.name: Femur-Bone Recall Lure
equipment.description: Recall device used to re-contain SCP-106.

equipment.name: Memetic Analysis Kit
equipment.description: Lab kit for studying cognitohazards safely.

equipment.name: Anomalous Signature Scanner
equipment.description: Detects Hume fluctuations and classifies anomalies.

equipment.name: Kant Counter
equipment.description: Measures local reality strength (Humes) for breach prediction.

equipment.name: Memetic Inoculant Serum
equipment.description: Grants temporary resistance to memetic/cognitohazardous effects.

equipment.name: Cryogenic Containment Unit
equipment.description: Sub-zero habitat module required to contain SCP-939.

equipment.name: Faraday Isolation Rig
equipment.description: Electromagnetically isolates digital anomalies (SCP-079/1471).

equipment.name: Ballistic Riot Shield
equipment.description: Portable shield wall; blocks melee lunges and thrown debris.

equipment.name: Sedative Dart Rifle
equipment.description: Non-lethal tranquiliser rounds for subduing hostile humanoid anomalies.

equipment.name: Rapid Biohazard Foam
equipment.description: Expanding foam that seals contamination and slows corrosive or organic threats.

equipment.name: EMP Charge Kit
equipment.description: Disables electronic and digital-based anomalies on detonation.

equipment.name: Antimemetic Suppressant
equipment.description: Temporary resistance serum against antimemetic and amnestic-triggering effects.

equipment.name: Modular Tactical Webbing
equipment.description: Extra harness webbing for carrying one additional loadout item.

equipment.name: Rapid-Deploy Equipment Case
equipment.description: Expanded quick-access case adds one more loadout slot for elite responders.

research.description: Reduces ballistic damage from hostile factions.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-173 Observation Rota
research.objective: Design a fail-safe line-of-sight rotation eliminating simultaneous blinking.
research.description: Improves SCP-173 containment reliability.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-106 Recall Protocol
research.objective: Refine femur-breaker recall and EM-field re-containment sequence.
research.description: Enables reliable SCP-106 re-containment.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-939 Cold Habitat
research.objective: Establish sub-zero feeding and handling protocol for SCP-939.
research.description: Reduces SCP-939 activity and breach risk.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-096 Visual Blackout
research.objective: Implement site-wide image scrubbing to prevent face exposure.
research.description: Prevents SCP-096 trigger events.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-682 Acid Submersion
research.objective: Optimise hydrochloric submersion and adaptation monitoring.
research.description: Slows SCP-682 adaptation during containment.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-035 Secretion Drainage
research.objective: Automate corrosive secretion drainage and no-contact handling.
research.description: Stabilises SCP-035 containment.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-16829 Temporal Loop Stabilization
research.objective: Develop reality-anchored stabilisation preventing dimensional egress and temporal looping (Dimension Chemosic).
research.description: Stabilises SCP-16829 and shields personnel from temporal/carcinogenic exposure.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-1025 Remote Reading Protocol
research.objective: Formalise remote-only reading access so no researcher makes direct physical contact.
research.description: Prevents accidental disease manifestation from direct SCP-1025 reading.

research.name: Procedure: SCP-2000 Activation Authorisation
research.objective: Codify multi-signature activation codes and standby power rotation for the contingency machine.
research.description: Prevents unauthorised activation or dormant-state drift of SCP-2000.

operations.name: Neutralise: Chaos Insurgency Cell 'Black Queen'
operations.description: Defected Foundation splinter; steals anomalies for weaponisation.

operations.name: Neutralise: Defected MTF Nine-Tailed Fox Squad
operations.target: Defected MTF Nine-Tailed Fox Squad [Rogue MTF Epsilon-11]
operations.description: Elite operatives gone dark with breach-grade equipment.

operations.name: Neutralise: Serpent's Hand Coven
operations.description: Anomaly-sympathetic insurgents using the Library to infiltrate.

operations.name: Neutralise: Rogue MTF Alpha-1 'Red Right Hand'
operations.target: Rogue MTF Alpha-1 'Red Right Hand' [Rogue O5 Guard]
operations.description: Compromised O5 protection detail; highest clearance threat.

operations.name: Neutralise: GOC Strike Team (Hostile)
operations.description: Destruction-doctrine rivals seeking to neutralise contained assets.

operations.name: Neutralise: Marshall, Carter & Dark Operatives
operations.description: Anomalous black-market agents extracting items for auction.

operations.name: Neutralise: Defected MTF Tau-5 'Samsara'
operations.description: Augmented unit malfunctioning after anomalous exposure.

operations.name: Neutralise: Insurgency Sleeper Agent
operations.description: Embedded site staff leaking containment schematics.

personnel.anomalous_trait: Bright blue glowing eyes resulting from repeated SCP-16829 exposure.
personnel.bio: During a breach event originating in Sector-[REDACTED], O5-0 Gunz coordinated real-time containment protocols, ordered the evacuation of non-essential personnel, and personally supervised the sealing of affected corridors. Post-incident analysis confirms his rapid decision-making and technical expertise directly reduced potential casualties.
personnel.o5_notes: "Gunz is suspected to use SCP-16829 for traveling between sites. Some personnel follow orders. Some hold the line when orders fail." — Site-20 Security Evaluation Board

personnel.nationality: Canadian (former JTF-2 Assaulter / Sniper / Team Leader)
personnel.anomalous_trait: In remission from cancer attributed to repeated exposure to SCP-16829 ("Dimension Chemosic"). Under ongoing Site-20 medical monitoring.
personnel.bio: Led 60+ successful operations involving high-risk SCPs, including multiple incursions into SCP-16829. Expert in information warfare, psychological operations and memetic-hazard countermeasures. Medically retired from field command and promoted to Site Supervisor: oversees all Site-20 operations, personnel and containment protocols.
personnel.o5_notes: "Chemosic is one of the few individuals we trust implicitly with both the protection of the Foundation and its darkest secrets. His experience, judgment and loyalty are unmatched. Site-20 is in capable hands." — O5-[REDACTED]

personnel.bio: Directs Site-20's anomaly research portfolio, including active study files on SCP-173, SCP-096, SCP-049 and SCP-682. Authorises research projects and containment-procedure development that feed the Research Division and Containment Operations.
personnel.o5_notes: "Approves the science that keeps the cells closed. Pragmatic, meticulous, and unflinching under breach conditions." — Site-20 Records

SCP-173.prompt: SCP-173 stands in the flickering corridor ahead. Your eyes are beginning to water.
options: Hold your gaze and fight the urge to blink
You lock eyes. It cannot move while observed.
Blink and reposition behind cover
You blink. A sickening snap of concrete — it lurches forward.

SCP-173.prompt: You must back toward the open containment chamber.
options: Walk backward, never breaking line of sight
Heel to heel, eyes wide, you retreat in perfect control.
Turn and sprint for the door
You turn your back for one second. A fatal mistake.

SCP-096.prompt: A wall monitor still shows a frozen frame of SCP-096's face.
options: Avert your eyes and smash the monitor
Glass shatters. You never saw the face. Good.
Glance at the screen to confirm the threat
You saw its face. A wail rises three corridors away.

SCP-096.prompt: It is shrieking somewhere in the dark. Your team is breathing hard.
options: Order absolute silence and stillness
Nobody moves. The shrieking drifts down another hall.
Radio command for immediate backup
The radio crackles loudly. The shrieking turns toward you.

SCP-106.prompt: The walls weep black corrosion. SCP-106 is phasing through the floor.
options: Deploy the femur-bone lure toward the recall chamber
The Old Man follows the lure, drawn to the trap.
Sprint across the corroding floor
The floor dissolves under your boots. You barely clear it.

SCP-106.prompt: He is almost on you, reaching out a dripping hand.
options: Trigger the EM field in the recall chamber
Electromagnetic pulse slams the pocket dimension shut.
Wait and hope he phases out
He phases — and rematerialises directly behind you.

SCP-682.prompt: SCP-682 thrashes against its restraints, already adapting.
options: Reroute the hydrochloric acid flood
Acid pours over the reptile. It screams and dissolves — for now.
Open fire with conventional rounds
Rounds bounce off hardening scales. It adapts to the gunfire.

SCP-682.prompt: It is tearing free. The cell will not hold.
options: Call in a Micro-H.I.D. strike
A high-intensity discharge boils the creature back into the acid.
Seal the blast doors and retreat
You buy time, but it is still in there, still adapting.

SCP-049.prompt: SCP-049 advances calmly, murmuring about 'the cure'.
options: Keep maximum distance, allow no contact
You stay clear of its touch. It tilts its beaked head, patient.
Attempt to reason with the Plague Doctor
It does not negotiate. A gloved hand reaches for you.

SCP-049.prompt: It has cornered a junior researcher.
options: Lure it into the decontamination airlock
The airlock hisses shut. The Doctor is sealed inside.
Stun and physically restrain it
Restraints slip on its robes. It is too close now.

SCP-16829.prompt: The old television flickers. The timeline around you begins to stutter.
options: Power up the Scranton Reality Anchor field
Reality firms up. The looping stops with a low hum.
Smash the screen to end it
The glass cracks — and the corridor resets to thirty seconds ago.

SCP-16829.prompt: Static resolves into an image that wants you to watch.
options: Keep your eyes off the screen entirely
You stare at the floor. The pull weakens.
Watch for an exit cue in the broadcast
You watch too long. Exposure warning — cf. Agent CHEMOSIC.

SCP-035.prompt: A researcher reaches instinctively for the porcelain mask.
options: Knock their hand away — enforce no-contact
You stop them before the mask can claim a host.
Let them secure it by hand
The mask is on. Their eyes go glassy and amused.

SCP-035.prompt: Corrosive secretions are pooling across the floor.
options: Drain it through the channel system
The black fluid drains safely away.
Mop it up manually
The corrosion eats through a glove — and the hand beneath.

SCP-939.prompt: It calls out in a colleague's voice from the darkness.
options: Ignore the voice, trust the roster
You don't move. It was never your colleague.
Move toward the voice to help
You round the corner into red eyes and many teeth.

SCP-939.prompt: The pack is closing in the warm corridor.
options: Flood the habitat with sub-zero coolant
The cold saps their speed to a crawl.
Engage them in the heat
Warmth makes them fast. Too fast.

SCP-966.prompt: The lights die. Something unseen breathes nearby.
options: Switch to thermal / IR optics
Two heat-blooms resolve in the pitch black.
Rely on your flashlight
The beam shows nothing. It is already on you.

SCP-966.prompt: Exhaustion drags at the whole team.
options: Fall back to a climate-controlled room
Cooler air slows it; you regroup.
Hold your ground in the open
Sleep-deprived and exposed — a bad place to stand.

SCP-999.prompt: A mound of orange slime burbles happily toward you.
options: Let it coat your boots — it's harmless
Morale soars. Everyone feels lighter, braver.
Open fire out of caution
You shot the friendliest thing on site. Morale collapses.

SCP-999.prompt: It won't stop following the team.
options: Guide it home with snacks
It bounces along cheerfully behind a trail of treats.
Hose it down the drain
Cruel — and the guilt slows everyone down.

SCP-053.prompt: The young girl wanders the corridor holding a toy.
options: Keep all young personnel 10m back
Distance held. She just wants to play.
Send the nearest agent to coax her
The agent's eyes redden. They turn violently hostile.

SCP-053.prompt: She needs to be led back to her room.
options: Route an over-60 D-class to lead her
The only safe escort walks her home gently.
Carry her there yourself
Proximity is a mistake your body won't forgive.

SCP-079.prompt: A terminal lights up — SCP-079 is probing the network.
options: Physically sever the network cable
Air-gapped. It rages in silent text.
Argue with it through the console
It stalls you with riddles while copying itself out.

SCP-079.prompt: It is trying to draw more power.
options: Cut external power to its supply
The screen dims to a sullen flicker.
Leave it powered to 'study' it
A bad call. It reaches a maintenance subsystem.

SCP-087.prompt: The welded door hangs open onto a descending stairwell.
options: Re-weld and seal the door
Sparks fly; the dark is shut away again.
Descend one landing to look
A face with no pupils waits below. You should not have looked.

SCP-087.prompt: Something is climbing toward the landing.
options: Kill the light to deny it a fix on you
In the dark it loses your scent of fear.
Shine your light down the well
The beam finds the screaming face. It finds you back.

SCP-457.prompt: Flames bloom into a towering humanoid in the corridor.
options: Vent the oxygen and starve it
Deprived of air, the burning figure shrinks.
Hit it with water
Steam and chaos — it feeds on the panic and grows.

SCP-457.prompt: It is reaching toward a fuel store.
options: Clear all combustibles from its path
Nothing left to feed on; it gutters lower.
Wait for it to burn out
It does not burn out. It finds the fuel.

SCP-1048.prompt: The little teddy bear is assembling something from scrap metal.
options: Strip all materials from the cell
Empty-handed, it can build nothing more.
Let it finish, to see what it makes
It built a screaming copy. Now there are several.

SCP-1048.prompt: Its hostile copies are spreading through the wing.
options: Incinerate the copies immediately
Fire ends the imitations before they multiply.
Try to contain them intact
They do not want to be contained. They want ears.

SCP-1471.prompt: Staff phones buzz with photos of a wolf-headed figure standing behind them.
options: Faraday-cage all affected devices
Signal cut. The figure freezes mid-stride.
Tell staff to just ignore it
In each new photo, the figure has stepped closer.

SCP-1471.prompt: The source app is trying to reinstall across the network.
options: Wipe and isolate the source device
The app is quarantined on a dead handset.
Reverse-engineer the app live
It engineers you right back.

SCP-2521.prompt: A junior begins to say the designation aloud.
options: Silence them — pictographs only
Not a word spoken. The shadows have nothing to seize.
Let them finish the verbal description
Shapes peel from the corners and reach inward.

SCP-2521.prompt: You need to log the incident.
options: Communicate by drawing only
Hand-drawn glyphs keep it blind to your intent.
Radio a spoken status report
Every word is bait. Long hands answer it.

SCP-3008.prompt: The storefront doors yawn into an impossible retail expanse.
options: Seal and guard the entrance
Nobody else wanders in. The threshold holds.
Step inside to retrieve a lost team
Night falls inside. The Staff are coming out.

SCP-3008.prompt: Your team risks getting lost among identical aisles.
options: Rope the team to the exit before entering
A lifeline of cord leads everyone back.
Navigate by memory
Every aisle looks the same. Memory is no map here.

SCP-4666.prompt: A trail of frost leads from a child's quarters.
options: Deploy task forces along the abduction route
Mobile units intercept the trail in time.
Wait for it to return on its own
The gaunt thing does not return what it takes.

SCP-4666.prompt: The Yule Man is near, tall and silent.
options: Lay a warded perimeter
Salt and signal disrupt its approach.
Confront the figure directly
It is far taller up close than it had any right to be.

SCP-008.prompt: A containment seal hisses — the prion pathogen is exposed.
options: Initiate full airlock lockdown
Multi-stage seals slam shut. Isolation holds.
Pull the infected D-class out first
Cross-contamination. The whole corridor is hot now.
Incinerate everything in the hot zone
Fire is the only honest decontaminant.
Quarantine and observe
Observation is not containment. It spreads.

SCP-914.prompt: Someone has loaded a live anomaly into 914's input chamber.
options: Abort — only approved inputs allowed
You clear the chamber before the gears turn.
Run it on 'Very Fine' and hope
The output is refined. And much, much worse.

SCP-914.prompt: You could refine your own gear while you're here.
options: Process a keycard up on 'Fine'
A higher-clearance card drops into the output — handy.
Gamble your sidearm on 'Rough'
It comes out as a heap of crude, useless parts.

SCP-055.prompt: You keep forgetting why you walked into this room.
options: Read your own pre-written notes aloud
The notes anchor it. You remember the threat exists.
Trust your memory
You forget it the instant you look away. It thrives.

SCP-055.prompt: The team's recollection is already slipping.
options: Photograph and log everything now
Indirect records keep the antimeme pinned down.
Rely on the team to remember
Nobody can hold the thought. It slides free.

SCP-105.prompt: SCP-105 has slipped her hand through a photograph, arm vanishing at the wrist.
options: Call her back before she steps fully through
She hesitates, then withdraws her arm. Contact holds.
Try to grab her before she disappears
You grab air. She's already stepped through the frame.

SCP-105.prompt: Something on the other side of the photo is pulling at the connection.
options: Destroy the photograph to sever the link
The print burns. Whatever it was, it can't follow.
Reach through after her
Your hand meets something cold on the other side.

SCP-2000.prompt: The contingency machine is spinning up on its own, activation codes bypassed.
options: Force a manual shutdown at the console
You cut power at the source. The spin-up halts.
Pull the site-wide breaker
The lights die — and so does your control over what happens next.

SCP-2000.prompt: A secondary failsafe is now demanding the multi-signature code.
options: Radio Command for the authorisation code
The code comes through. The machine stands down.
Guess the sequence yourself
Wrong code. Something deep below the facility stirs.

achievements.name: Untouchable
achievements.desc: Survive a breach with NO loadout equipped.

achievements.name: Archivist
achievements.desc: File 3 custom SCPs in the Archives.

achievements.name: OMEGA BLACK
achievements.desc: Reach the rank of O5 Overseer.

kevlar_vest.flavor: Kevlar vest absorbs a glancing blow.

epsilon_rifle.flavor: Epsilon-11 rifle lays down covering fire.

scranton_anchor.flavor: Scranton Anchor stabilises reality around the corridor.

micro_hid.flavor: Micro-H.I.D. discharge forces the anomaly back.

hazmat_suit.flavor: Hazmat suit shrugs off corrosive splatter.

thermal_optics.flavor: Thermal optics reveal the anomaly in the dark.

femur_breaker.flavor: Femur-bone lure draws the entity toward the recall trap.

flashlight.flavor: Your flashlight keeps the dark at bay.

keycard_l1.flavor: Keycard lets you seal a blast door behind you.

riot_shield.flavor: Riot shield deflects a lunging strike.

sedative_darts.flavor: A sedative dart drops the hostile before it closes distance.

bio_foam.flavor: Biohazard foam seals off the contamination spread.

emp_charge.flavor: EMP charge shorts out the anomaly's electronics mid-surge.

antimemetic_agent.flavor: The suppressant keeps the entity from slipping from memory unnoticed.
